2606.08481.title: PIPE-Cypher: Automatic Enterprise Benchmark Generation for Text-to-Cypher Systems
2606.08481.paper_summary: Enterprise property graphs vary widely in schema structure, internal terminology, domain assumptions, governance constraints, and user interaction patterns. A deployment-relevant Text2Cypher benchmark therefore reflects the questions users and agents actually ask of that graph. Creating such a benchmark is difficult because schemas and values are unique, and graph structure changes over time. Each NL-query pair must also be executable, use real graph entities, preserve diversity, and remain balanced across query types and difficulty levels. We present PIPE-Cypher, a local benchmark-generation pipeline that turns a live property graph and optional seed queries from customer questions, analyst logs, or agent tool calls into balanced NL-to-Cypher benchmarks. PIPE-Cypher combines schema profiling, reverse-query grounding, constrained generation, deterministic Cypher governance, execution validation, redaction, diversity controls, and a calibrated local LLM judge. Using local Qwen3.5-9B generation and judging, PIPE-Cypher exports 3,000 accepted FinBench/SNB examples, completes three audited ablation suites, calibrates judge behavior with human labels, and evaluates 11 local downstream models. The resulting benchmark is deliberately discriminative: zero-shot transfer is weak, while a few-shot control shows that schema-specific example banks can help compatible model families. Together, PIPE-Cypher makes Text2Cypher benchmarking a repeatable process that evolves with the graph, its users, and its target workloads.
2606.08481.paper_summary_zh: 企業屬性圖在架構結構、內部術語、領域假設、治理限制和用戶互動模式上差異甚大。<lb/>因此，與部署相關的 Text2Cypher 基準反映了用戶和代理實際對該圖提出的問題。<lb/>創建這樣的基準是困難的，因為架構和數值是獨特的，並且圖的結構隨時間而變化。<lb/>每個自然語言查詢對都必須是可執行的，使用真實的圖實體，保持多樣性，並在查詢類型和難度級別之間保持平衡。<lb/>我們提出了 PIPE-Cypher，一個本地基準生成管道，將一個實時屬性圖和來自客戶問題、分析師日誌或代理工具調用的可選種子查詢轉換為平衡的自然語言到 Cypher 的基準。<lb/>PIPE-Cypher 結合了架構分析、反向查詢基礎、受限生成、確定性 Cypher 治理、執行驗證、編輯、多樣性控制和校準的本地 LLM 評判。<lb/>使用本地 Qwen3.5-9B 生成和評判，PIPE-Cypher 輸出 3,000 個接受的 FinBench/SNB 範例，完成三個審核的消融套件，使用人類標籤校準評判行為，並評估 11 個本地下游模型。<lb/>最終生成的基準故意具有區分性：零樣本轉移較弱，而少量樣本控制顯示架構特定的範例庫可以幫助兼容的模型家族。<lb/>總之，PIPE-Cypher 使 Text2Cypher 基準測試成為一個可重複的過程，隨著圖、用戶和目標工作負載的演變而演進。
2606.08481.author: Suraj Ranganath et.al.
